---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: 想要的新功能或改进 / Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 你想要解决什么问题 / What problem are you trying to solve?

<!--
不要直接说 "我想要 X 功能"，先描述你遇到的实际场景 / 痛点。
Don't lead with "I want feature X" — describe the actual scenario / pain point first.
-->

## 你想象的解决方案 / Your proposed solution

<!-- 你希望 KnowMe 怎么解决这个问题 / How should KnowMe solve it? -->

## 替代方案 / Alternatives considered

<!-- 还想过哪些方法？为什么觉得它们不够好？ / Other approaches you considered, and why they're not enough -->

## 对标 / Reference

<!--
有没有其他工具已经做了类似的事情？
Has another tool already solved this? (Obsidian / Notion / Logseq / Roam ...)
-->

## 优先级 / Priority

<!--
- ⭐ Nice to have — 没有也能凑合
- ⭐⭐ Strongly want — 缺了影响日常使用
- ⭐⭐⭐ Blocker — 没有就用不了 KnowMe
-->
